block_01: This simple yet powerful tool is what many traders use to understand what works, what doesn’t, and what needs improvement.
block_02: Are you looking an effective way to unlock your trading potential? Then it’s time for you to start recording your trades in a trading journal.
block_03: Why do you need a trading journal?
block_04:
A journal is valuable trading aid for many reasons.
It can help you:
block_05: Learn to identify trends and patterns
block_07: Track your growth as a trader
block_10: Discover the benefits of keeping a trading journal by visiting the IQ Option Blog.
